title: festuca paniculata subsp. baetica
intro: Festuca paniculata subsp. baetica, commonly known as Baetic fescue, is a subspecies of the Festuca paniculata grass, native to southern Spain and northwestern Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Baetic fescue include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Baetic fescue can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
